pluginDescription: Switch the whole station radio frequency from a global schedule or rotation list.
bandSwitchEnabledDesc: When enabled, the station radio follows the global switching settings below.
bandSwitchModeDesc: Use schedule mode for fixed daily frequency windows, or rotation mode for unattended monitoring across several frequencies.
autoTuneAfterSwitchEnabledDesc: After a successful frequency switch, automatically enable the tuner and run one tune cycle when the connected radio supports it.
bandScheduleEntriesDesc: Uses local system time. Days accept daily, mon-fri, sat,sun, or 1-5 where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday. Frequencies are in MHz.
rotationFrequenciesMhzDesc: One frequency per line, in MHz, for example 14.074.
rotationIntervalMinutesDesc: How many minutes to wait before switching to the next frequency.
